feed.title: Application-to-Web Internals
feed.subtitle: Discover the world of REST APIs with our comprehensive notes and insights. From basic concepts to advanced techniques, we provide valuable resources for developers and enthusiasts alike.

entry.title: Welcome to the blog
entry.content:
This is the first post for HarborClient Blog.

Jekyll makes it easy to create a fast, static website without a database. That makes it a great fit for personal blogs, documentation sites, and simple project pages.

In the coming posts, I plan to share quick notes about building, shipping, and refining small projects.
entry.summary: This is the first post for HarborClient Blog.
